source_pr.title: ddl : ddl forbid partition table switch into cache and add view feature test
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/29318

Problem Summary:

This is a subtask of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25293
### What is changed and how it works?
+ Forbid partition table switch cacheable`alter partition table cache` is not supported
+ Add view feature test, `alter view cache`is invalid.
+ Created a file specially used to test the operation of the cache table ddl,  and integrated some tests into it.
### Check List 

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

-  Unit test

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

evidence: files: ddl/db_cache_test.go, ddl/db_test.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/error.go, ddl/table.go, errors.toml, executor/admin_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/point_get.go
